name: deimosnz
message: Tu was an amazing guide. Full of great facts and kept the tour interesting. The time we spent at the markets trying different foods was super! I really enjoyed the 'dining' lesson at the local restaurant that he took us to. Trying the salt coffee that he suggested was also a highlight.
feedbackSummary: Outstanding guided food tour with knowledgeable guide Tu, featuring market food tasting and dining experience with salt coffee highlight.
reviewTitle: A great history lesson and foodie tour
title: A great history lesson and foodie tour
content: Tu was an amazing guide. Full of great facts and kept the tour interesting. The time we spent at the markets trying different foods was super! I really enjoyed the 'dining' lesson at the local restaurant that he took us to. Trying the salt coffee that he suggested was also a highlight.
